name: Chocolate Covered Marshmallow Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first four ingredients and set aside.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
3. Add the egg, vanilla extract, and milk; mix well.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture and mix thoroughly.
5. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8 minutes. Do not overbake. Remove cookies from the oven.
7. Top each cookie with a marshmallow half.
8. Return the cookies to the oven for an additional 2 minutes.
9. Place cookies on wire racks to cool.
10. Meanwhile, beat together the last five ingredients until smooth.
11. Spread this mixture onto each cooled cookie.
12. Optionally top each with a pecan half.
Makes 3 dozen cookies.
